name: 3 of a Kind
description: '''3 of a Kind''' were a [[UK garage]] act, best known for their 2004 number one [[hit single]], "[[Baby Cakes (song)|Baby Cakes]]". Its members were Liana Caruana (a.k.a. Miz Tipzta), Nicholas Gallante (a.k.a. MC Devine) and Marc Portelli. Marc and Liana met the day they recorded "Baby Cakes".
